title: microlepidium pilosulum
intro: Microlepidium pilosulum, also known as Prickly Lettuce, is a species of flowering plant in the mustard family, characterized by its prickly leaves and stems. It has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Microlepidium pilosulum include reducing fever, alleviating headaches, and soothing digestive issues, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. The plant is often prepared into tea, tinctures, or infusions for consumption, and its extracts have also been used in topical applications for skin and wound care.
